title: gnome-shell bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[40.10-28]
- Allow restart/shutdown on lock screen
  Resolves: RHEL-103984

[40.10-27]
- session-opened signature is reverted to keep ABI compatibility,
  use session-opened-with-session-id instead
  Related: RHEL-92307
full_text:
[40.10-28]
- Allow restart/shutdown on lock screen
  Resolves: RHEL-103984

[40.10-27]
- session-opened signature is reverted to keep ABI compatibility,
  use session-opened-with-session-id instead
  Related: RHEL-92307

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20706-0.html
